notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for malaysia. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

documents.title: Malaysia Tourist Entry, eVISA, and MDAC

chunks.title: 中国护照马来西亚短期旅游签证建议
chunks.content: 中国护照持有人短期赴马来西亚旅游时，VIZA AI 应优先核查马来西亚移民局/外交部当前对中国公民的 social visit visa exemption 或 eVISA 规则。当前知识库范围覆盖旅游/社交访问；若用户目的为工作、学习、长期居留或多次商务活动，应提示需要不同准证或向官方确认。

chunks.title: Malaysia China/India short social visit exemption
chunks.content: Malaysia's visa liberalisation materials and Immigration pages state that citizens of China and India may be covered by a visa exemption for social visit purposes for up to 30 days. VIZA AI should avoid promising entry: the final decision is made by Malaysian immigration at the border, and travellers should still prepare passport validity, return/onward ticket, accommodation, funds, and any required arrival declaration.

chunks.title: Malaysia eVISA and arrival declaration
chunks.content: For travellers who are not visa-exempt or whose purpose/stay does not fit the exemption, route them to the official Malaysia eVISA portal and current Immigration Malaysia instructions. Malaysia also operates a digital arrival card/MDAC process for many foreign arrivals; VIZA AI should tell users to complete current official arrival requirements before travel and verify exemptions on the Immigration Malaysia site.

documents.title: Malaysia Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Malaysia application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Use Malaysia eVISA where required/eligible and complete MDAC where applicable before arrival. Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://malaysiavisa.imi.gov.my/evisa/evisa.jsp ; https://www.imi.gov.my/index.php/en/main-services/visa/. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Malaysia fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: Malaysia eVISA/entry intake should collect identity, passport, nationality and residence, contact details, travel dates, entry/exit points, accommodation, purpose, prior Malaysia travel/visa history, and MDAC arrival details.

chunks.title: Malaysia supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: Common evidence includes passport biodata page, compliant photo, return/onward ticket, accommodation booking, bank statement or funds evidence when required, birth certificate/consent for minors where relevant, and any previous visa or residence evidence. Workflow guardrails: VIZA should distinguish visa-exemption, eVISA and MDAC. MDAC is not a visa and should be tracked as a separate pre-arrival declaration.
